showFloatingHelpersPanel: Tampilkan panel pembantu mengambang pada OpenFront
hideFloatingHelpersPanel: Sembunyikan panel pembantu mengambang di OpenFront
Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront: Tampilkan panel pembantu mengambang pada OpenFront
If openfront.io was already open when yo: Jika openfront.io sudah terbuka ketika Anda menginstal ekstensi ini, isi ulang tab itu sekali. Jika tidak, ekstensi tidak akan bekerja pada tab itu.
Adds a red marker to nation AI names on: Tambahkan penanda merah ke nama AI bangsa pada peta.
Tambahkan penanda merah ke nama AI bangsa.
Highlights allies with remaining allianc: Menyalakan sekutu dengan sisa waktu aliansi.
Harap hanya menggunakan dalam permainan solo atau kustom.
⚠ Only available in solo or custom games: Silakan hanya menggunakan dalam permainan solo atau kustom.
Shows predicted enemy nuke landing point: Menunjukkan musuh nuklir titik pendaratan dan radius ledakan.
Menunjukkan musuh nuklir titik pendaratan dan radius ledakan.
Shows enemy boat landing points. Red = t: Menunjukkan kapal musuh mendarat. Merah = menargetkan Anda, kuning = menargetkan orang lain.
Hover an enemy to show high-damage atom: Hover musuh untuk menunjukkan tinggi kerusakan atom dan target hidrogen.
Adds auto economy and population nuke ac: Tambahkan ekonomi otomatis dan aksi nuklir populasi ke roda pemain.
Also show auto nuke options when right-c: Juga menunjukkan opsi nuklir otomatis ketika kanan mengklik sekutu pemain.
Team games only: blocks trades with play: Hanya tim game: blok perdagangan dengan pemain yang tidak di tim Anda.
Blocks trades with players who are not o: Blocks perdagangan dengan pemain yang tidak di tim Anda.
Available only during an active team gam: Hanya tersedia selama permainan tim aktif.
Tambahkan GPM ke panel hover pemain.
Show team gold per minute preview: Tampilkan data emas per menit preview
Lists each team's total GPM in team game: Daftar total GPM setiap tim dalam permainan tim.
Shows observed ship and train trade impo: Menunjukkan kapal dan perdagangan kereta impor dan ekspor.
Shows observed trade imports and exports: Menunjukkan impor perdagangan dan ekspor yang diamati.
Highlights structures with observed trad: Struktur dengan pendapatan dagang yang diamati.
Hover a player to highlight the partner: Memegang pemain untuk menyoroti industri pasangan yang mengisi ekspor mereka.
Hover a player to highlight export partn: Hover pemain untuk menyoroti mitra ekspor.
Show a notification when a game is found: Tampilkan pemberitahuan ketika suatu permainan ditemukan
Matches team lobbies with more than 4 pl: Pertandingan tim dengan lebih dari 4 pemain per tim.
You can turn on all three at the same ti: Kau bisa menghidupkan ketiganya sekaligus. Hanya satu dari mereka yang harus cocok.
Include requires a match. Exclude blocks: Sertakan membutuhkan kecocokan. Exclude blok pilihan. Untuk memulai emas, nilai yang disertakan sudah cukup, sementara nilai yang dikeluarkan selalu ditolak.
Show Mark bot nations red preview: Tampilkan pratinjau merah bangsa Mark bot
analyticsOptInDescription: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Only join lobbies whose max player count: Only join lobbies whose max player count is greater than this number.
You can turn on all four at the same tim: You can turn on all four at the same time. Only one of them has to match.
Send a transport with 1% troops, then re: Send a transport with 1% troops, then restore the attack ratio.
Moves alliance requests and renewal prom: Moves alliance requests and renewal prompts into a separate right-side window.
Right-click any tile to send a boat with: Right-click any tile to send a boat with 1% troops, then restores your ratio.
analyticsConsentIntro: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
analyticsConsentTrackedFeatureToggles: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedSummaries: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedVersionLanguage: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
analyticsConsentAnonymousNoGameplay: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
analyticsConsentAnonymousLocalId: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
This helps improve the extension by show: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
Feature toggles, such as which helper wa: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
Coarse usage summaries, such as how many: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
Extension version and language, so issue: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
No OpenFront account, player names, lobb: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
A random local analytics ID is created o: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
analyticsSupportText: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fi: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
